figmake.custom_skills.skill_form_instruc.string: Ex: You are a senior product designer reviewing work before it goes to a design crit. When I share a frame or component, evaluate it for visual hierarchy, spacing and alignment consistency, typography scale, and color usage. Call out anything that feels off or inconsistent with common design patterns. Be direct but constructive, and suggest specific changes.

living_designs.suggestions.signup_flow.p.string:
Design a user-friendly sign-up flow for a website that aims to provide an effortless onboarding experience for new users.
  - Left panel: Visual storytelling with image carousel, tagline, smooth auto-advances
  - Right panel: Signup form, offer alternative signin methods (google and apple)
  - Break out fields into a multi-step flow and show progress between steps

figmake.custom_skills.skill_form_instruc.string: Ex: You are an expert workshop facilitator designing a FigJam session. When I share a goal, audience, or topic, create a clear workshop flow with sections, activities, prompts, timing, and expected outcomes. Make the session easy to run live, collaborative, and focused. Suggest specific sticky-note prompts, voting moments, timing for each section, and wrap-up actions.

seat_billing_terms.modal.tos.subscriptio.string: We’ll transition your {planTier} to new pricing at your next 12-month renewal on {renewalDate, date, long}. checkout.cart_review_upgrade_info_pro_an.string: Seats you add or upgrade mid-subscription period will default to monthly at the {monthlyPriceLink}, but can be changed to annual at any time. These seats will be charged starting the date of approval, prorated at a daily rate until the end of your billing period, and added to your next invoice. If you don’t want to renew, you can cancel your subscription in your Admin settings before your next renewal date.

community.resource_landing_page.make.bot.string:
Discover projects created with Figma Make that showcase AI-powered design and generation. Each example begins with a short prompt and is ready to remix or reuse.
Find AI templates for websites, apps, dashboards, prototypes, and more. Learn prompt patterns, explore design approaches, and copy components to speed up your build. Start from any project or write your own prompt to generate new screens in minutes — no code required.

community.weave_page.extended_descriptio.string: Weave is Figma’s AI workflow tool for generating images, video, and creative assets using prompts and layered controls. This page showcases curated Weave workflow templates built by the team and Community creators. Explore ready-made workflows, filter by use case, and open them in Weave to customize and create your own variations. Whether you’re experimenting with visual styles, automating production assets, or prototyping ideas, these workflows help you move from concept to output faster.

billing.purchase_ai_credits.summary.disc.string: By clicking “Confirm,” you agree to the {figmaAiTermsLink}. Your AI credit subscription will be prorated to align your Figma Order Term and charged on your next invoice. If your current contract is set to auto-renew, your AI credit subscription will auto-renew and you’ll be charged the above amount annually, unless you cancel this subscription by providing notice to your customer representative or by initiating a support request at {contactSupportLink} at least 30 days before the end of your then-current subscription period.

seat_billing_terms.modal.tos.subscriptio.string: At your upcoming renewal, prices will be based on the amount of seats at the renewal date multiplied by seat types’ annualized rates. In all following renewals, your subscription price for renewals will be calculated the same way it has been in the past—based on the number of seats purchased in the previous subscription period (including new seat additions) or the number of seats in {organizationName}'s account on the renewal date—whichever is greater. We’ll take that number of seats and multiply it by the applicable seat types’ prices at their annualized rates to determine your costs.

community.skills_page.extended_descripti.string: Figma skills are markdown files that guide AI models on how to work with Figma primitives and concepts. Each skill defines a specific set of actions and context, such as creating components, generating layouts, or syncing variables between code and Figma. This page is designed to help you discover what’s possible. You can explore a curated set of skills, understand how they work, and choose the ones that fit your workflow. Each skill links to its source, where you can view, install, and use it in your development environment. Figma skills make it easier to move faster between code and design, reuse existing systems, and automate repetitive tasks.

pro_cart.payment.sepa_direct_debit_manda.string: By providing your payment information and confirming this payment, you authorise (A) Figma and Stripe, our payment service provider, to send instructions to your bank to debit your account and (B) your bank to debit your account in accordance with those instructions. As part of your rights, you are entitled to a refund from your bank under the terms and conditions of your agreement with your bank. A refund must be claimed within 8 weeks starting from the date on which your account was debited. Your rights are explained in a statement that you can obtain from your bank. You agree to receive notifications for future debits up to 2 days before they occur.
